title: Cuneiform Tablet #0652: Old Babylonian Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
